_publications._publicationTitle: Combined CDK4/6 and ERK1/2 Inhibition Enhances Antitumor Activity in NF1-Associated Plexiform Neurofibroma.

_contextSnippet: Primary murine DNSCs were isolated from E13.5 Nf1flox/flox embryos and transduced with adenovirus encoding Cre recombinase to ablate the floxed Nf1 alleles
details: Successfully transduced primary murine DNSCs to ablate floxed Nf1 alleles for synergy screens and biochemical assays
